summary: Iteration 2 testing complete - All 3 new features tested successfully. Backend: 14/14 rewards API tests passed (100%). Frontend: All responsive layout, public homepage, and rewards features working correctly.

issues: Console warning: 'shadow*' style props are deprecated. Use 'boxShadow' instead

seed_data_creation: No additional seed data created. Used existing seeded rewards catalog (6 rewards: Shoutout on Air 100pts, Priority Request 50pts, Sticker Pack 75pts, VIP Badge 200pts, Concert Ticket 150pts, DJ Meet & Greet 500pts)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 2 features working correctly. Public homepage loads without login and shows Sign In button. Responsive desktop layout working with centered content (max-width 960px) and side-by-side hero/shows. Rewards system fully functional: points awarded automatically for requests (+10), chat (+5), check-in (+25), leaderboard sorted correctly, redemption working with point deduction, history showing transactions. Admin has 25 points from previous check-in.
